---
title: "P8106-Midterm"
output: github_document
date: "2026-03-24"
---
```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)
library(glmnet)
library(tidyverse)
library(corrplot)
```

```{r}
load("datA.RData")
datA
```

```{r}
str(datA)
summary(datA)
```

```{r}
# check missing value
colSums(is.na(datA))
```


## EDA

```{r}
# check y distribution
ggplot(datA, aes(x = log_PFS)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 30) +
  theme_minimal()
```

```{r}
# numerical variables
eda_numeric <- function(data, var, response = "log_PFS") {
  
  # Histogram
  p_hist <- ggplot(data, aes(x = .data[[var]])) +
    geom_histogram(fill = "lightblue", color = "white", bins = 30) +
    labs(title = paste("Histogram of", var), x = var, y = "Frequency") +
    theme_minimal()
  
  # Boxplot
  p_box <- ggplot(data, aes(y = .data[[var]])) +
    geom_boxplot(fill = "green4") +
    labs(title = paste("Boxplot of", var), y = var) +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_blank(), axis.ticks.x = element_blank()) 
  
  # Scatter plot
  p_scatter <- ggplot(data, aes(x = .data[[var]], y = .data[[response]])) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.3, color = "darkblue") +
    geom_smooth(method = "loess", color = "red") +
    labs(title = paste(var, "vs", response), x = var, y = response) +
    theme_minimal()
  
  combined_plot <- (p_hist | p_box) / p_scatter +
    plot_annotation(tag_levels = 'A')
  
  print(combined_plot)
}
```

```{r}
# categorical variables
eda_categorical <- function(data, var, response = "log_PFS") {
  boxplot(data[[response]] ~ data[[var]],
          main = paste("Boxplot of", response, "by", var),
          xlab = var,
          ylab = response,
          col = "lightgreen")
}
```

```{r}
numeric_vars <- c("age", "bmi", "tumor_size", "lymph_nodes", "Ki67")
categorical_vars <- c("menopause", "race", "tumor_grade", "ER", "PR", 
                      "HER2", "stage", "surgery", "chemo", "hormonal_therapy")
```

```{r}
for (v in numeric_vars) {
  eda_numeric(datA, v)
}
```

```{r}
for (v in categorical_vars) {
  eda_categorical(datA, v)
}
```

## correlation
```{r}
numeric_data <- datA[, numeric_vars]
cor_matrix <- cor(numeric_data, use = "complete.obs")
cor_matrix 
```

```{r}
corrplot(cor_matrix, method = "color", type = "upper",
         addCoef.col = "black",  # show numbers
         tl.col = "black", tl.srt = 45)
```




## Model fitting
```{r}
# Base linear model
lm1 <- lm(log_PFS ~ . - id, data = datA)
summary(lm1)
```

```{r}
# LASSO
x <- model.matrix(log_PFS ~ . - id, data = datA)[,-1]
y <- datA$log_PFS

lasso <- cv.glmnet(x, y, alpha = 1)

plot(lasso)

coef(lasso, s = "lambda.min")
```

```{r}
# elastic net
elastic <- cv.glmnet(x, y, alpha = 0.5)

plot(elastic)

coef(elastic, s = "lambda.min")
```


### linear model after lasso&elastic net
```{r}
lm_final <- lm(
  log_PFS ~ age + tumor_size + lymph_nodes +
    Ki67 + ER + HER2 +
    tumor_grade + hormonal_therapy,
  data = datA
)

summary(lm_final)
par(mfrow=c(2,2))
plot(lm_final)
```


### linear model after lasso&elastic net with interaction
```{r}
lm_final_interaction <- lm(
  log_PFS ~ age + tumor_size + lymph_nodes +
    Ki67 + ER + HER2 +
    tumor_grade + hormonal_therapy +
    tumor_size:lymph_nodes,
  data = datA
)

summary(lm_final_interaction)
par(mfrow=c(2,2))
plot(lm_final_interaction)
```



## GAM
```{r}
library(mgcv)

gam_1 <- gam(log_PFS ~ 
                   s(age) +
                   s(tumor_size) +
                   s(lymph_nodes) +
                   s(Ki67) +
                   tumor_grade +
                   ER +
                   HER2 +
                   hormonal_therapy,
                 data = datA)

gam_2 <- gam(log_PFS ~ 
                   s(age) +
                   s(tumor_size) +
                   s(lymph_nodes) +
                   s(Ki67) +
                   tumor_grade +
                   ER +
                   HER2 +
                   hormonal_therapy +
                   te(tumor_size,lymph_nodes),
                 data = datA)

anova(gam_1, gam_2, test = "F")
```


# Plot of GAM
```{r}
plot(gam_1)
```


# MARS
```{r}
library(earth)

# Fit MARS directly
mars_model <- earth(
  log_PFS ~ age + tumor_size + tumor_grade + lymph_nodes + ER + HER2 + Ki67 + hormonal_therapy,
  data = datA,
  degree = 2  # optional: allow 2-way interactions
)

# Summary of selected terms
summary(mars_model)
```

```{r}
# Cross-validation 
library(caret)

set.seed(123)

ctrl <- trainControl(
  method = "cv",
  number = 5
)
```

```{r}
x <- datA[, c("age", "tumor_size", "tumor_grade", "lymph_nodes", "ER", "HER2", "Ki67", "hormonal_therapy")]
y <- datA$log_PFS
```


```{r}
lm_fit <- train(x, y, method = "lm", trControl = ctrl)
lasso_fit <- train(x, y,
                   method = "glmnet",
                   tuneGrid = expand.grid(alpha = 1, lambda = seq(0.001, 0.1, length = 20)),
                   trControl = ctrl)
enet_fit <- train(x, y,
                  method = "glmnet",
                  tuneLength = 10,
                  trControl = ctrl)
gam_fit <- train(x, y,
                 method = "gam",
                 trControl = ctrl)
mars_fit <- train(x, y,
                  method = "earth",
                  tuneLength = 10,
                  trControl = ctrl)
```


```{r}
results <- resamples(list(
  Linear = lm_fit,
  Lasso = lasso_fit,
  ElasticNet = enet_fit,
  GAM = gam_fit,
  MARS = mars_fit
))

summary(results)
bwplot(results)
```


```{r}

```
